title: APIs & server logic
description: REST and WebSockets, webhooks, server-side validation, rate limiting, and third-party API integration (Stripe, OpenAI, etc.). Node/Express or Next API routes.

title: Auth & sessions
description: Better Auth, OAuth, JWT, session handling, and secure token flows. No "auth as an afterthought."

title: Databases & data layer
description: Schema design, migrations, Drizzle/ORM, PostgreSQL (Neon/Supabase), queries and indexing. From design to production data.

title: Real-time backend
description: Live channels, presence, and event pipelines (Pusher, Socket.IO, Supabase Realtime). Server-driven real-time, not just UI updates.

title: Payments & billing
description: Stripe Checkout/Connect, subscriptions, webhooks, and idempotent payment handling on the server.

title: Ship SaaS from scratch
description: End-to-end: architecture, backend + frontend, auth, payments, deploy. One codebase, one owner.

title: UI & animations
description: Pixel-accurate UIs, Framer Motion / GSAP, responsive layouts, and interfaces that feel polished.

title: AI in the product
description: GPT/Gemini integration, Vercel AI SDK, guardrails, and UX that feels native. Backend: prompt pipelines, tool use, streaming.

title: Deploy & iterate
description: Vercel, envs, DB provisioning (Neon/Supabase), and minimal DevOps so you can ship and iterate fast.
